name: cybrix-skills
description: Official Claude Code skills from Cybrix — deploy static sites to a live HTTPS URL in under 60 seconds.

plugins.name: cybrix-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy the current static site to a live HTTPS URL via Cybrix. Detects Next.js export, Astro, Vite, Hugo, Eleventy, and plain HTML. Returns a live URL on *.cbrx.cc in under 60 seconds.
